word: G1856 - ἐξωθέω - exōthéō - ex-o-theh'-o - Drive out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξωθέωἐξώθω

- Transliteration: Exotheo

- Phonetic: ex-o-theh'-o

- Definition: AV - drive out 1, thrust in 1, 2

- Origin: from G1537 and otheo (to push)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and ὠθέωō theō (to push); to expel; by implication to propel: - drive out thrust in.
